revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「'''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん） * 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – 群馬県高崎市にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま...」
revision.text:
'''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん） * 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – 群馬県高崎市にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市) – 埼玉県さいたま市桜区にある古墳 * 秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市) – 埼玉県本庄市にある円墳。秋山古墳群 * 庚申塚古墳 (多摩市) – 東京都多摩市にある円墳。和田古墳群 * [[庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] – 長野県飯綱町にある前方後円墳。全国で5例確認されている格子目叩きの[[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土 * 庚申塚古墳 (富士市) – 静岡県富士市にある双方中方墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (磐田市) – 静岡県磐田市にある前方後円墳 * 條庚申塚古墳 (御所市) – 奈良県御所市條にある古墳
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:こうしんつかこふん}}

'''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん） * 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – [[群馬県]][[高崎市]]にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市) – [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]][[桜区]]にある古墳 * 秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市) – 埼玉県[[本庄市]]にある円墳。秋山古墳群 * 庚申塚古墳 (多摩市) – [[東京都]][[多摩市]]にある円墳。和田古墳群 * [[庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] – [[長野県]][[飯綱町]]にある前方後円墳。全国で5例確認されている格子目叩きの[[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土 * 庚申塚古墳 (富士市) – 静岡県富士市にある双方中方墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (磐田市) – 静岡県磐田市にある前方後円墳 * 條庚申塚古墳 (御所市) – 奈良県御所市條にある古墳
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:こうしんつかこふん}}

* 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – [[群馬県]][[高崎市]]にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市) – [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]][[桜区]]にある古墳 * 秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市) – 埼玉県[[本庄市]]にある円墳。秋山古墳群 * 庚申塚古墳 (多摩市) – [[東京都]][[多摩市]]にある円墳。和田古墳群 * [[庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] – [[長野県]][[飯綱町]]にある前方後円墳。全国で5例確認されている格子目叩きの[[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土 * 庚申塚古墳 (富士市) – 静岡県富士市にある双方中方墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (磐田市) – 静岡県磐田市にある前方後円墳 * 條庚申塚古墳 (御所市) – 奈良県御所市條にある古墳
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:こうしんつかこふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

'''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん）
* 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – [[群馬県]][[高崎市]]にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市) – [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]][[桜区]]にある古墳 * 秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市) – 埼玉県[[本庄市]]にある円墳。秋山古墳群 * 庚申塚古墳 (多摩市) – [[東京都]][[多摩市]]にある円墳。和田古墳群 * [[庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] – [[長野県]][[飯綱町]]にある前方後円墳。全国で6例目となる格子目叩きの[[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土 * 庚申塚古墳 (富士市) – 静岡県富士市にある双方中方墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (磐田市) – 静岡県磐田市にある前方後円墳 * 條庚申塚古墳 (御所市) – 奈良県御所市條にある古墳

revision.comment: Created page with "'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|en|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|en|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|en|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, p..."
revision.text:
'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|en|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|en|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|en|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|en|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * [[Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)]] – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|en|円筒埴輪}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|en|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|en|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|en|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:こうしんつかこふん}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]]

'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|en|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|en|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|en|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|en|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * [[Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)]] – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|en|円筒埴輪}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|en|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|en|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|en|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].

revision.text:
'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:こうしんつかこふん}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:庚申塚古墳]] [[category:Koushintsuka Kofun]] [[Category:untranslated pages]] [[category:Koushintsuka Kofun]][[Category:untranslated pages]] [[ja:庚申塚古墳]]

{{aimai}}

'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}

* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}

'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].

revision.text:
'''Kōshin-zuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Takasaki)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (高崎市)}} – A circular kofun located in [[Takasaki]], [[Gunma Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Saitama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市)}} – A kofun located in [[Sakura-ku]], [[Saitama City]], [[Saitama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Akiyama Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Honjō City]], Saitama Prefecture, part of the Akiyama Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Tama)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (多摩市)}} – A circular kofun in [[Tama City]], [[Tokyo]], part of the Wada Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|8=ja|9=庚申塚古墳_(飯綱町)|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iizuna)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun in [[Iizuna]], [[Nagano Prefecture]], known for yielding a lattice-patterned {{ill|hollow haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}—the sixth such discovery nationwide. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Fuji)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (富士市)}} – A square-shaped kofun located in [[Fuji City]], [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Kōshin-zuka Kofun (Iwata)|ja|庚申塚古墳 (磐田市)}} – A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[Iwata City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Jō Kōshin-zuka Kofun|ja|條庚申塚古墳 (御所市)}} – A kofun located in [[Jō]], [[Gose City]], [[Nara Prefecture]].
{{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん）
* 庚申塚古墳 (高崎市) – [[群馬県]][[高崎市]]にある円墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (さいたま市) – [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]][[桜区]]にある古墳 * 秋山庚申塚古墳 (本庄市) – 埼玉県[[本庄市]]にある円墳。秋山古墳群 * 庚申塚古墳 (多摩市) – [[東京都]][[多摩市]]にある円墳。和田古墳群 * [[庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] – [[長野県]][[飯綱町]]にある前方後円墳。全国で6例目となる格子目叩きの[[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土 * 庚申塚古墳 (富士市) – 静岡県富士市にある双方中方墳 * 庚申塚古墳 (磐田市) – 静岡県磐田市にある前方後円墳 * 條庚申塚古墳 (御所市) – 奈良県御所市條にある古墳
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:こうしんつかこふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[庚申塚古墳]] to [[Koushintsuka Kofun]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
